title: Restriction digest
steps: Combine the materials: >500 ng DNA (500 ng for diagnostic digest, >1000ng for restriction cloning) 0.5-1 uL each restriction enzyme Buffer (appropriate buffer indicated by enzyme manufacturer, to a final concentration of 1x) dH2O to total volume of 20 ul.

Incubate tube for an appropriate temperature at an appropriate time (usually 37 C, time varies; generally 1 h for NEB enzymes, 10-30 min for FastDigest enzymes. Follow the manufacturer's instructions.).
Visualize the results of your digest, conduct gel electrophoresis.
creator: Snehadri Sinha
